timingInterpretationPolicy.workloadUnitWallMetricUse: timed workload-unit wall end-to-end ranking metric
timingInterpretationPolicy.guidance: When timingInterpretation.selectedTiming.scopeClass is narrow-hot-path, deltaPercent remains a phase-specific diagnostic. Claimability evaluates timingInterpretation.workloadUnitWall.deltaPercent when that full metric is available.

workloads.name: gemma-3 270m shaped prefill 64tok + decode 64tok
workloads.description: Single-run Gemma-3-270M-shaped inference sequence with a 64-token prefill phase and 64 sequential single-token decode phases using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit buffer writes.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples combined Gemma-3-270M-shaped inference sequence. Both sides execute one retained-kernel command stream containing a 64-token prefill phase followed by 64 single-token decode phases under the runtime compare harness.

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. workloadUnitWall adds the full timed workload-unit wall interval for the command the harness ran.

workloadUnitWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the full timed workload-unit view for one comparable workload unit, not a warm-session-only metric.

selectedGap.note: The normalized difference between workloadUnitWall and selected timing for each timed sample.

attributedHostOverhead.note: Sum of coarse host-overhead buckets recorded outside the selected execution timing. These buckets are once-per-sample phase timers, not per-dispatch probes.

unattributedGapRemainder.note: Selected-gap remainder after subtracting the coarse host-overhead buckets. This typically captures trace-meta emission, process teardown, and any uninstrumented sample overhead.

inputRead.note: Input/config file reads before selected execution timing begins.

inputParse.note: Command/plan parsing and input decoding before selected execution timing begins.

workloadPrepare.note: Pre-execution workload preparation such as dispatch-context or buffer-spec setup.

executorInit.note: Executor/device/backend initialization outside the selected execution timing.

uploadPrewarm.note: Doe upload-path prewarm work outside the selected execution timing.

kernelPrewarm.note: Kernel/pipeline prewarm work outside the selected execution timing.

commandOrchestration.note: Command-loop bookkeeping outside traced execution phase timing.

artifactFinalize.note: Post-execution artifact writing/finalization outside the selected execution timing.

hostOverheadBreakdown.note: Coarse host-overhead buckets are recorded around existing once-per-sample phase boundaries so they explain workloadUnitWall minus selected timing without inserting hot-path profiling probes.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the full timed workload-unit view for one comparable workload unit, not a warm-session-only metric.
